## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 1, 2026 - Jun 9, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ted9992827363_, Jun 9, 2026, 1/5: "The iPad version the last couple of days completely unusable. When I tried to open the app, it’s completely unresponsive when I resize the window it doesn’t even resize itself. After keeping the app open for sometime it eventually start functioning again, but when I try to use it again most of the time it’s just frozen."
            2. _Clerouxy_, May 17, 2026, 1/5: "Since the latest update, the app completely freezes on launch on my iPad. I can open it, but it gets stuck on the home screen and I cannot tap anything or log in. I already tried: deleting and reinstalling the app multiple times, fully restarting my iPad, making sure iPadOS is up to date. Nothing worked. The issue started after the recent update, so it may be related to that version."
            3. _IPadBeppe_, May 17, 2026, 1/5: "App freezes completely regularly and forces me to use the browser. Closing the app or even deleting and re-installing it does not help. I’m on an iPad 11 (M4) with iOS 26.5. Competitor’s apps work fine in this setup."
